result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 17 variables (NSID, 7 collapsed adolescent variables hown14-hown20, 2 collapsed adult variables hown25 and hown32, and 7 detailed adolescent variables hownteen14-hownteen20). All source files were loaded from data/input/, merged using full_join by NSID, recoded with standard missing value codes, and the required derived variables were created according to the metadata specifications.
